title: The Seven Essential Factors for Ethical AI Policy
description: A flowchart illustrating the seven interconnected factors that must be considered when developing ethical public policy for artificial intelligence, showing their relationship to core ethical principles.
relationships: All factors influence and are influenced by each other
Each factor connects to and supports the core principles of Beneficence, Non-maleficence, Autonomy, Justice, and Explainability
The interconnected nature shows that policy cannot be developed by considering factors in isolation
